prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical data for BRK-B was analyzed to estimate key parameters: an average daily log return of approximately 0.000357 (corresponding to roughly 9% annualized growth) and a daily log volatility of approximately 0.0095 (corresponding to roughly 15% annualized volatility), which is typical for a stable stock like BRK-B. The point estimate provided is the *median* of the predicted price distribution, derived from the log-normal properties of the GBM model over 18 days. Confidence intervals are calculated using standard Z-scores for the respective confidence levels (50%, 80%, 90%) applied to this log-normal distribution.
